steps.title: Locate the reason for the difference
steps.content: The passage gives a speed difference (389 vs. 80 km/hr) and then provides the reason: flight features limit speed less than running features. The blank must express what CAUSES this difference.

steps.title: Test the choices for causation
steps.content:
”A consequence of” directly works—the speed difference is a result of how flight and running features differ in limiting speed.

The other three don't establish causation: objective suggests a goal, repudiation means rejection, and explanation would mean the difference clarifies the features rather than resulting from them.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
